title: catha crenata
intro: Catha crenata, also known as Somaliland khat, is a plant species within the genus Catha, native to the Horn of Africa. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including serving as a stimulant and providing relief from fatigue, stress, and anxiety due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Catha crenata include improved mental clarity and focus, as well as potential anti-inflammatory properties. Catha crenata is typically consumed as a herbal preparation, often in the form of fresh leaves or dried powder, although its use and regulation vary widely depending on the region and cultural context.
